description:
# Fine Dining Scallop Dish

This elegantly plated seafood dish features seared scallops with a golden crust, artfully arranged on a bed of vibrant green pea purée and served in a delicate cream sauce. The presentation conveys upscale fine dining, enhanced by fresh rosemary sprigs, chive garnish, and purple microflower accents that add sophistication and visual refinement to the composition.
